stage1States.ariaLabel: Release access, payment, and provisioning states

active.title: Access active
active.description: Paid VPN access is active and ready for normal connection delivery.

trial_active.title: Trial active
trial_active.description: Trial access is active. Review the expiry date before the trial window closes.

grace.title: Grace period
grace.description: VPN access remains available during the 72-hour grace window. Renew manually before it closes.

expired.title: Access expired
expired.description: VPN access is expired or disabled. Renew the plan or contact support before connecting.

payment_pending.title: Payment pending
payment_pending.description: Payment is not final yet. Access will be issued after payment confirmation and reconciliation.

provisioning_pending.title: Provisioning pending
provisioning_pending.description: The plan exists, but VPN delivery is still preparing credentials or an access channel.

no_access.title: No access yet
no_access.description: No active entitlement is available. Start trial or choose a plan to request VPN access.

checking.title: Checking access
checking.description: The dashboard is loading the latest entitlement snapshot before showing the final access state.

paid.title: Payment accepted
paid.description: Billing state is settled for the current access window.

not_started.title: Payment not started
not_started.description: No live payment is attached to the current access state.

pending.title: Payment pending
pending.description: Provider confirmation is still pending. Keep this payment under review until it becomes final.

processing.title: Payment processing
processing.description: Provider processing is in progress. Do not retry the same checkout until the status is final.

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.description: Payment failed or was rejected. Use a new checkout or contact support if funds were reserved.

expired.title: Payment expired
expired.description: The payment window has expired. Create a new renewal or plan invoice.

refunded.title: Refund recorded
refunded.description: A refund is recorded for this billing state. Access may need manual support review.

reconciliation_required.title: Manual review required
reconciliation_required.description: Payment and access state need manual reconciliation. Support should resolve it within the S1 24-hour policy.

checking.title: Checking payment
checking.description: The dashboard is loading billing signals before showing the final payment state.

ready.title: VPN ready
ready.description: Remnawave delivery has a service identity, credential, profile, and access channel.

pending.title: Provisioning pending
pending.description: VPN credentials or delivery channel are not ready yet. Retry or wait for worker reconciliation.

retrying.title: Provisioning retrying
retrying.description: The backend is retrying VPN delivery. Contact support if this does not resolve quickly.

failed.title: Provisioning failed
failed.description: VPN delivery failed. Support must re-run provisioning or issue manual remediation.

remnawave_unavailable.title: Remnawave unavailable
remnawave_unavailable.description: The dashboard cannot reach the provisioning state. Retry before changing access or payment data.

reconciliation_required.title: Provisioning review required
reconciliation_required.description: Payment/access and VPN delivery disagree. Support must reconcile under the paid entitlement escalation policy.

not_required.title: Not required yet
not_required.description: Provisioning starts after trial activation or a final paid access decision.

checking.title: Checking provisioning
checking.description: The dashboard is loading VPN delivery signals before showing the final provisioning state.
